用喷笔可以快速上底漆。
Yòng pēnbǐ kěyǐ kuàisù shàng dǐqī.
Using an airbrush can apply primer quickly.

masking

用遮盖带保护不想涂的区域。
Yòng zhēgài dài bǎohù bù xiǎng tú de qūyù.
Use masking tape to protect areas you don't want to paint.

varnish

最后喷一层清漆保护模型。
Zuìhòu pēn yī céng qīngqī bǎohù móxíng.
Finally spray a layer of varnish to protect the model.

board game

dice

player (sports)

team

league
